title: Activist short post-performance
question: Do activist short reports keep working, and does the publisher matter?
finding: No tradable post-report drift. Across 96 campaigns (14 publishers, 2020–26) the 21-day path is indistinguishable from a random day in the same names (edge +1.8pp, bootstrap CI spans 0); the only structure is publisher identity (Hindenburg targets keep falling, Muddy Waters' bounce) — but every publisher bar one has n≤21, so indicative, not significant.
